title: Innodata Inc (INOD) Q4 2024 Earnings Call Highlights: Record Revenue Growth and Strategic Expansion
text: Innodata achieved impressive growth metrics in Q4 2024, with quarterly revenue reaching $59.2 million, representing a 127% year-over-year increase and surpassing projections. For the full year, the company generated $170.5 million in revenue, up 96% from 2023. The company ended 2024 with significantly improved liquidity, holding $46.9 million in cash, significantly up from $13.8 million at year-end 2023. Adjusted EBITDA climbed to $34.6 million, a 250% year-over-year jump. Management forecasts 40% or more revenue growth for 2025. The largest customer relationship expanded substantially, with annualized revenue reaching approximately $135 million, supplemented by additional programs valued at $24 million. The effective tax rate is projected to increase to 28-31.5% in 2025 due to prior losses being utilized. The company also highlighted concerns regarding data distillation potentially causing model collapse in AI development.
